pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly downloads the file to this path.
Verified the download URL in setup_task.sh is https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opengeos/data/main/raster/landsat.tif, and downloaded the image confirming it is a real 4-band Landsat raster.
Verified from task description instructions. Note: export_result.sh checks for any newly created .dim files rather than strictly enforcing this filename.
Verified from task description instructions. Note: export_result.sh checks for any newly created .tif files rather than strictly enforcing this filename.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for snap_env supervised_ml_land_cover task, verifying that a real 4-band Landsat image is downloaded from github.com/opengeos/data. The required output formats (DIMAP and GeoTIFF) and file paths match the explicit prompt description, and export_result.sh checks for their creation after task start. Additionally, discovered that the task is defective because 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, making the task programmatically unscorable.
